title: argyrolobium goodioides
intro: Argyrolobium goodioides, also known as the "Stink Bush", is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating respiratory issues. In traditional herbal preparations, Argyrolobium goodioides is often used to make teas, infusions, or decoctions, which can be used to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
